subject: refactor(map): extract layer helper, add cluster constants, fix stale comments
body:
Extract addStationSourceAndLayers() so the init and style-switch effects
share identical layer definitions — the duplicated 60-line block had
already drifted once (text-allow-overlap). Also adds CLUSTER_MAX_ZOOM
and CLUSTER_PIXEL_RADIUS to mapMarkers.ts, and fixes stale comments
referencing prefers-color-scheme and "blue dot".

Tags: map, refactor, documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: map
Semver: patch
